---

## Company Overview

**CodeX Tech Innovations & Consultants LLP** is a Bengaluru-based software development studio specializing in mobile app development, web development, SaaS product development, cloud engineering, AI integration, and UI/UX design. Founded in 2018, the company has shipped 150+ digital products with a 98% client retention rate and a 4.9/5 client rating.

- **Legal Name**: CodeX Tech Innovations & Consultants LLP
- **Alternate Name**: CODEX
- **Founded**: 2018
- **Location**: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India (Geo: 12.9716, 77.5946)
- **Employees**: 40–60
- **Website**: https://codextechinnovations.com
- **Email**: hello@codextechinnovations.com
- **Phone**: +91 99999 99999
- **Price Range**: ₹₹₹₹ (Premium)
- **Operating Hours**: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00
- **Languages Supported**: English, Hindi
- **Service Area**: India (500 km radius from Bengaluru) and Worldwide

### Social Links

- Twitter: https://twitter.com/codextech
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/codextechinnovations

- Rating: 4.9/5

- Best Rating: 5

---

## Key Differentiators

1. **Senior Engineers Only** — Every developer has 5+ years of production experience. No juniors, no bait-and-switch.
2. **Fixed-Price Contracts** — Agree on scope, timeline, and total cost upfront. Zero scope-creep surprises.
3. **Full Source Code Ownership** — You own 100% of the codebase from day one. No vendor lock-in.
4. **12–16 Week Delivery** — From signed contract to live product in 12–16 weeks.
5. **Dedicated Project Manager** — One senior PM as single point of contact. Daily updates, weekly demos.
6. **6-Month Free Warranty** — 6 months of free bug fixes post-launch.

---

## Services

### Core Services

#### Mobile App Development
Builds apps that users open multiple times a day — engineered for the habit loop.
- iOS & Android native apps (Swift, Kotlin)
- React Native & Flutter cross-platform
- Full UI/UX design to App Store submission
- Push notifications, offline-first & analytics
- ASO & post-launch performance monitoring

#### Web Development
Websites and web platforms engineered to convert, rank, and scale.
- SEO-optimised architecture from day one
- Core Web Vitals 95+ Lighthouse score
- SaaS platforms, portals & e-commerce
- Headless CMS & API-first development
- Conversion Rate Optimisation built-in

#### SaaS Development
Multi-tenant SaaS products across 8+ verticals.
- Multi-tenant SaaS architecture
- Subscription & usage-based billing
- Role-based access & team workspaces
- API-first with partner integrations
- In-app onboarding & feature adoption

### Secondary Services

#### Cloud & DevOps Engineering
Cut infrastructure costs by 40% and hit 99.9% uptime.
- **Tech**: AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform

#### AI & Intelligent Automation
LLM-powered chatbots, custom ML models, and RAG pipelines.
- **Tech**: OpenAI, LangChain, TensorFlow, Python, RAG, Fine-tuning

#### Product Analytics & CRO
A/B testing, funnel analysis, heatmaps, and monthly conversion reports.
- **Tech**: Mixpanel, Amplitude, A/B Testing, Heatmaps, Funnel Analysis

#### App Publishing & Store Management
Publish your app to the Apple App Store and Google Play Store using our registered developer console accounts. We handle the entire submission, App Store review process, TestFlight beta testing, and production release — end-to-end.
- **Tech**: Apple Developer Program, Google Play Console, TestFlight, App Store Connect, Beta Testing

---

## How We Work (6-Phase Process)

### Phase 01 — Discovery & Audit
**Week 1–2**
We understand the business model, user psychology, competitive landscape, and technical constraints.
- **Deliverables**: Business requirements document, User persona mapping, Competitor analysis report, Technical feasibility assessment

### Phase 02 — Strategy & Blueprint
**Week 2–3**
Design technical architecture, choose the right stack, define APIs, and create a milestone-driven roadmap.
- **Deliverables**: Technical architecture document, Stack recommendation report, Sprint-by-sprint roadmap, Fixed-price contract

### Phase 03 — UI/UX Design
**Week 3–6**
Build interactive prototypes grounded in UX research, validate with real users, and iterate.
- **Deliverables**: User journey maps, Wireframes & hi-fi mockups, Interactive Figma prototype, Design system & component library

### Phase 04 — Agile Development
**Week 6–16**
Two-week sprints with daily async standups, weekly live demos, and a shared project board.
- **Deliverables**: Working software every 2 weeks, CI/CD pipeline, Automated test suite, Weekly video demo calls

### Phase 05 — QA & Performance
**Week 14–16**
Cross-device testing, security audits, load testing at 10x expected traffic, Core Web Vitals optimization.
- **Deliverables**: Cross-device test reports, Security vulnerability scan, Performance audit (Lighthouse 95+), UAT sign-off

### Phase 06 — Launch & Scale
**Week 16+**
Zero-downtime deployment, real-time monitoring, and 6-month free bug-fix warranty.
- **Deliverables**: Production deployment, Monitoring & alerting setup, 6-month free warranty, Monthly growth reports

---

## Products & Solutions (8 Live in Production)

### 1. PG Management System
- **Category**: Property Tech
- **Status**: Live — Best Seller
- **Description**: End-to-end platform for PG owners to manage bookings, automate rent collection, handle tenant onboarding, and track occupancy. Cuts admin time by 70%.
- **Features**: Online booking & room allocation, Automated rent reminders & payment gateway, Tenant KYC & digital agreements, Maintenance request tracking, Occupancy & revenue analytics dashboard
- **Tech Stack**: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Razorpay, AWS

### 2. Hostel Management System
- **Category**: Education Tech
- **Status**: Live — EdTech Pick
- **Description**: Comprehensive administration platform for educational institutions covering room allocation, mess management, fee collection, student tracking, and parent communication.
- **Features**: Smart room allocation engine, Mess plan & meal tracking, Fee management & receipt generation, Student attendance & conduct records, Parent portal with real-time updates
- **Tech Stack**: React Native, Next.js, MongoDB, Firebase, Stripe

### 3. Hotel Management System
- **Category**: Hospitality Tech
- **Status**: Live — Enterprise Grade
- **Description**: A hotel-grade PMS handling online reservations, front desk check-ins, housekeeping workflows, POS billing, and guest satisfaction tracking.
- **Features**: Real-time reservation & channel management, Front desk & housekeeping workflows, Multi-channel online booking engine, POS billing & room service management, Guest feedback & loyalty programs
- **Tech Stack**: React, Python, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Redis

### 4. Compliance & CA Manager
- **Category**: FinTech
- **Status**: Live — FinTech Ready
- **Description**: FinTech workflow platform streamlining compliance tracking, client management, and CA operations. Automates GST filing reminders, ITR status tracking, and document collection. Saves firms 15+ hours per week.
- **Features**: GST & ITR deadline automation, Client document vault & e-sign, Compliance calendar & alerts, Multi-user CA team workspace, Billing & invoice management
- **Tech Stack**: React, Node.js, MySQL, AWS S3, Razorpay

### 5. Store Management System
- **Category**: Retail Tech
- **Status**: Live — Retail Ready
- **Description**: Robust retail platform with integrated POS, real-time inventory tracking, supplier management, and sales analytics for single outlets and multi-branch chains.
- **Features**: Touchscreen POS with barcode scanning, Real-time stock & reorder alerts, Multi-branch inventory management, Supplier & purchase order system, Sales reports & profitability analytics
- **Tech Stack**: React, Electron, Node.js, SQLite, Thermal Print

### 6. OMF Food Delivery App
- **Category**: Food Tech
- **Status**: Live — Food Tech
- **Description**: White-label food delivery platform connecting customers with restaurants via consumer app, restaurant dashboard, and delivery agent app. Live GPS tracking included.
- **Features**: Customer iOS & Android app, Restaurant owner dashboard, Delivery partner app with live GPS, Real-time order tracking, Ratings, promos & loyalty wallet
- **Tech Stack**: React Native, Node.js, Socket.io, Google Maps, Razorpay

### 7. Wroggle Clothing Store
- **Category**: Fashion Tech
- **Status**: Live — Fashion Tech
- **Description**: Next-generation fashion retail platform with smart size recommendations, look-builder tools, and full inventory management backend for D2C fashion brands.
- **Features**: AI-powered size & style recommendations, Visual look-builder & outfit curator, Multi-variant inventory management, Influencer affiliate program module, Returns & exchange automation
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, React Native, MongoDB, Stripe, Cloudinary

### 8. Arthomed Hospital System
- **Category**: Health Tech
- **Status**: Live — Health Tech
- **Description**: ABDM-aligned hospital management solution covering patient registration, OPD/IPD workflows, EMR, pharmacy, lab, and billing. Reduces patient wait times and eliminates paperwork.
- **Features**: Patient registration & EMR, OPD/IPD queue management, Pharmacy & lab module integration, Insurance & billing automation, Doctor scheduling & telemedicine
- **Tech Stack**: React, Python, PostgreSQL, HL7 FHIR, ABDM APIs

## Technology Stack

| Category | Technologies |
|----------|-------------|
| **Mobile** | React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin, Expo, Capacitor |
| **Frontend** | React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux |
| **Backend** | Node.js, Python, Go, Java Spring, GraphQL, REST APIs |
| **Database** | PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, MySQL, Supabase, Prisma |
| **Cloud** | AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Firebase, Vercel, Cloudflare |
| **DevOps & AI** | Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, OpenAI, LangChain |

## Industries Served

1. **E-Commerce & Retail** — High-conversion storefronts, marketplace platforms, omnichannel commerce
2. **Healthcare & MedTech** — HIPAA-compliant portals, telehealth apps, clinical workflow automation
3. **Fintech & Payments** — Secure payment gateways, digital wallets, lending platforms
4. **EdTech & E-Learning** — LMS platforms, live video classrooms, gamified learning, assessment engines
5. **Real Estate & PropTech** — Property listing platforms, virtual tours, CRM systems, investment analytics
6. **Logistics & Supply Chain** — Fleet tracking, last-mile delivery, warehouse management, demand forecasting
7. **Enterprise SaaS** — B2B platforms, internal tools, ERP integrations, multi-tenant architectures
8. **Gaming & Entertainment** — Mobile games, streaming platforms, loyalty apps, real-time leaderboards

---

## FAQ

**How much does a mobile app typically cost?**
Most apps range from ₹15L–₹60L depending on complexity, platform (iOS/Android/both), and integrations. Fixed-price quote provided after a free discovery call.

**Do you sign NDAs before project discussions?**
Yes. Mutual NDAs are signed before any technical discussion.

**What happens to my source code and data?**
You own 100% of everything — source code, design files, database schemas, and all third-party accounts.

**Can you work with our existing team?**
Yes. We integrate with your Jira/Linear, join standups, and work with your existing CI/CD.

**What does post-launch support look like?**
6 months of free bug fixes included. Retainer plans start at ₹40K/month for ongoing maintenance.
